item.dc:creator: ObsessedWithAnimals

item.title: A beautiful moment from the new Spider-Man movie. (Spoilers)
item.description: Source: Spider-Man: No Way Home (2021) #intergalacticqualitygifs (Check WiFi befoe entering.) What makes this amazing and so touching to me, is that I wasn't a huge Andrew Garfield fan before this and I don't even remember Gwen's death in his movie, but as a huge comic fan I knew the significance of this scene. Redemption in it's purest form. Sorry if sound is a little off.
item.dc:creator: BabyFarkMcGeeZax

item.title: Well done, mate
item.dc:creator: CanWeStopTalkingNow

item.title: This reminds me. Say HI to your Mom.
item.dc:creator: WeirdAlisMySpiritUserName

item.title: Sent this to my electrician friend saying I fixed it and he didn't need to come over. 10 minutes later he was pounding on my door with the fear of god in his face.
item.description: I of course apologized for the joke and gave him beer and money for his time since he looked and fixed my actual problem while he was there. When you're friends with a professional regardless if it's a hard trade or soft. IT, Mechanic, photographer, or anything else. ALWAYS OFFER FAIR COMPENSATION!!!! Because they're your friend you can trust that they will treat you fair and do a good job vs a stranger. But it doesn't mean it should be a free job. Something simple sometimes a few beers are enough but always offer a fair rate if you don't want them to start avoiding you. Also don't only call them when you need something, that's not a real friendship.
item.dc:creator: researchonyourown

item.title: Another mediocre meme dump pt 3
item.description:
I don’t know how many of these it’ll take to clear out my phone, but my desktop computer is next. Buckle up.
I feel very called out. See cat tax for details.
Cat tax. This is Porkchop, I found her in a dumpster. Shes beautiful. Edit: Pt 2: https://imgur.com/gallery/DciDY01 Pt 1: https://imgur.com/gallery/q9jvH2j Most viral edit: Aw jeez, I’m glad you all like my dumpster fire humor. I make weird art, the link for my shop is in my profile if you wanna go look at it. You can also DM me questions about custom orders, tips for resin work, and dog photos.
item.dc:creator: madcraftapothecaries

item.dc:creator: IdontEatBooty

item.title: NATO Needs to Start Drawing Red Lines Now
item.description: I’ve about had it with this shit. Putin is damned well determined to remake the Soviet Union, and sanctions are not going to stop him. NATO nations need to start getting approval from their Parliaments and/or Congress’ to allow war to be declared if certain conditions are met. The world cannot just roll over. This is a Hitler moment. Do we watch half the world burn before anyone does anything?
item.dc:creator: majorpaine99

item.title: Happened half an hour ago
item.description: Video call setting. Disagreement about how to document some random shit resulted in someone not even on my reporting structure getting all passive-aggressive - "Well, I'm not sure your department can speak to being disorganized, seeing as how you, [TheOnlyPtylerdactyl], your OWN documentation is inconsistently dated throughout!" A second of quiet before my department lead says, "That's because [the company we all work for] doesn't throw out all the documentation for the whole project every new version. Changes are documented and dated as they're made, so that we know WHEN things change. If your team isn't accurately recording their documentation, we need to maybe have an all-staff on standards." Other guy goes on mute lol. Steve, I owe you a beer. Comments, tell me your story of someone confidently stepping in a pile of "I'm a dumb motherfucker" sauce
item.dc:creator: TheOnlyPtylerdactyl

item.title: Camberley Kate and her stray dogs
item.description: Camberley Kate, aka Kate Ward, and her stray dogs in England. She never turned a stray dog away, taking care of more than 600 dogs in her lifetime. (1962)

item.title: What a story arc...
item.description: The $750-million cruiser "Moskva" has now been acknowledged sunk by the Russian Ministry of Defense. https://www.cnn.com/europe/live-news/ukraine-russia-putin-news-04-14-22/h_0a1383d24931e88d4f4fbdefb4d3cc2c Moskva was the flagship of the Black Sea fleet and was responsible for the capture of Snake Island, leading to one of the most memorable moments of the war. (Photo of sinking ship in meme not actually Moskva, no photos are available as of this time.)
item.dc:creator: sharikov
